title: Estuary 1 · 2001 · the one lever
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: Twelve weeks on the flat
entries.blurb: One lever, one gate, one estuary. You ran the season and the season ran you back. Marc Ostrom's first score is a drone in D that gains a voice for every species doing well — nobody told you that either.

entries.title: The DNA of the series
entries.blurb: Everything Oneironautics made afterward is in here somewhere: the patience, the refusal to explain itself, the report card that grades you on things you didn't know were being watched.

entries.title: PATIENCE · A
entries.blurb: You touched the gate twice or less in twelve weeks. The estuary noticed. The report card noticed. Nobody else will ever know what it cost you.

entries.title: Week 13
entries.blurb: There is no Week 13. You saw it anyway: the night screen after the report card, the flat under no moon, the gate in its final position. The cartridge holds one more week than the box promises.
